findings.title: Missing mitigation: Signature enforcement (FORCE_INTEGRITY)
findings.description: Signature enforcement (FORCE_INTEGRITY) is not enabled. Driver can load without a valid Authenticode signature.

findings.title: Missing mitigation: Control Flow Guard (/guard:cf)
findings.description: Control Flow Guard (/guard:cf) is not enabled. Indirect calls unvalidated — control-flow hijacking easier.

findings.title: Driver is NOT HVCI-compatible
findings.description: Driver fails HVCI checks (missing FORCE_INTEGRITY or has W+X sections). Cannot load in HVCI-enabled environments without policy bypass.

findings.title: Kernel write gadgets found (8 instances)
findings.description: Multiple 'mov [reg+offset], reg' patterns in driver code. If the register is derived from user input (e.g., IOCTL buffer), this is an arbitrary kernel memory write primitive.

findings.title: No PreviousMode / RequestorMode check detected
findings.description: Driver does not import ExGetPreviousMode or KeGetPreviousMode and no inline KTHREAD.PreviousMode read was found. Without checking PreviousMode, a kernel-mode caller could be impersonated, or user-mode requests may bypass validation. IOCTLs should verify RequestorMode == UserMode before trusting input.

findings.title: Driver is NOT digitally signed
findings.description: No Authenticode signature found in the PE security directory. Since Windows 10 1607+, kernel drivers must be signed by Microsoft or have a valid cross-signed certificate. An unsigned driver can only load with test-signing or Secure Boot disabled.

findings.title: Load blocked: Driver is unsigned
findings.description: Windows 10 (1607+) requires all kernel drivers to have a valid Authenticode signature. An unsigned driver will only load if test-signing mode is enabled via 'bcdedit /set testsigning on', which disables Secure Boot.

findings.title: HVCI incompatible: missing FORCE_INTEGRITY flag, has W+X sections
findings.description: This driver is NOT compatible with Hypervisor-protected Code Integrity (HVCI / Memory Integrity). On systems with HVCI enabled, Windows will BLOCK this driver from loading. Issues: missing FORCE_INTEGRITY flag, has W+X sections.

findings.title: Driver architecture: x64
findings.description: 64-bit driver — loads on x64 Windows

findings.title: Load compatibility: BLOCKED — 3 issue(s) prevent loading
findings.description:
[BLOCKED] No Signature: Unsigned drivers cannot load on Win10+ with Secure Boot
  [BLOCKED] HVCI: Blocked when Memory Integrity is ON (missing FORCE_INTEGRITY flag, has W+X sections)
  [BLOCKED] Secure Boot: Blocked when Secure Boot is enabled

blockers: FORCE_INTEGRITY flag not set (HVCI requires it on the PE header)
Unsigned — test-signing still needs any signature
No WHQL attestation EKU — S Mode / Secured-Core require WHQL-signed drivers
No Authenticode page hashes (Secured-Core requires per-page integrity)

findings.title: ROP/JOP gadgets found: 6288 total (misc: 2425, reg-control: 1317, memory-read: 1117, memory-write: 1108, stack-pivot: 272, jmp-reg: 47, syscall: 2)

    0x1400089EF: xchg edx, eax ; add dword ptr [rax], eax ; xor eax, eax ; add rsp, 0x28 ; ret
  [memory-write] (1108 found):
    0x1400078D3: mov dword ptr [rip + 0x59f33], 1 ; xor eax, eax ; ret
    0x1400078D1: jmp 0x1400078dd ; mov dword ptr [rip + 0x59f33], 1 ; xor eax, eax ; ret
    0x1400078CF: add byte ptr [rax], al ; jmp 0x1400078dd ; mov dword ptr [rip + 0x59f33], 1 ; xor eax, eax ; ret
  [memory-read] (1117 found):
    0x14000765F: mov ecx, dword ptr [rsp + 0x28] ; call 0x140044aa0 ; add rsp, 0x38 ; ret
    0x14000765E: mov rcx, qword ptr [rsp + 0x28] ; call 0x140044aa0 ; add rsp, 0x38 ; ret
    0x14000765C: and al, 0x20 ; mov rcx, qword ptr [rsp + 0x28] ; call 0x140044aa0 ; add rsp, 0x38 ; ret
  [reg-control] (1317 found):
    0x1400014C3: pop rdi ; ret
    0x1400014C2: pop r15 ; ret
    0x1400014C1: pop rsi ; pop r15 ; ret
  [jmp-reg] (47 found):

    0x140007836: mov rcx, qword ptr [rdx + rax*8 + 0x51320] ; jmp rcx
    0x140007831: adc eax, 0xffff87ca ; mov rcx, qword ptr [rdx + rax*8 + 0x51320] ; jmp rcx
